name: SaaS CRM login, dashboard e Supabase

engineering.projectName: SaaS CRM login, dashboard e Supabase

model.reason: full-stack SaaS needs architecture, frontend, backend and database reasoning
model.policy: Pick the strongest configured model for architecture first, then use coding, design and test roles for the build loop.

tools.purpose: Prepare company, market, competitor and reference context before writing files.
Turn the request into screens, entities, routes, file map and acceptance criteria.
Create real project files, configs, docs and editable source code.
Model Supabase tables, activity logs, env example and integration notes.
Check hierarchy, responsiveness, copy, CTA and premium 2026 polish.
Run smoke tests and syntax checks with logs stored in the manifest.
Iterate up to five cycles when validation fails.
Open the generated preview and keep it connected to project memory.
Prepare a repository without secrets and record GitHub delivery steps.
Create or reuse Render deployment, warm the public URL and verify readiness.

agents.name: Nexus Researcher
agents.role: Find context, risks, references and conversion language.

agents.name: Nexus Product Architect
agents.role: Define product scope, data model, routes and user journeys.

agents.name: Nexus Frontend Designer
agents.role: Raise visual quality, animations, responsiveness and UI states.

agents.name: Nexus Backend Engineer
agents.role: Create APIs, health checks, persistence and integration contracts.

agents.name: Nexus Database Engineer
agents.role: Design Supabase schema, seeds, policies and env rules.

agents.name: Nexus Test Engineer
agents.role: Run smoke checks, syntax validation and repair loops.

agents.name: Nexus Deploy Engineer
agents.role: Prepare GitHub, Render, public URL checks and publish notes.

agents.name: Nexus Security Reviewer
agents.role: Keep secrets out of the project and protect deploy files.

agents.name: Nexus Project Memory
agents.role: Preserve project-specific context for future improvements.

agents.name: Nexus Delivery Lead
agents.role: Summarize what changed and what is ready for the user.

projectMemory.rule: Every improvement request must read docs/nexus-project-memory.md and update the same workspace.

executionPhases.label: Plan
executionPhases.expectedOutput: Architecture, file map and acceptance criteria.

executionPhases.label: Build
executionPhases.expectedOutput: Frontend, backend, database and docs files.

executionPhases.label: Validate
executionPhases.expectedOutput: Smoke tests, syntax checks and repair notes.

executionPhases.label: Preview
executionPhases.expectedOutput: Client-visible preview connected to the workspace.

executionPhases.label: Publish
executionPhases.expectedOutput: GitHub/Render readiness and public URL monitor.

acceptanceCriteria: Create real editable source files, not only a placeholder preview.
Ship a Supabase schema and environment example for the project database.
Expose a visual preview that matches the requested domain.
Run smoke tests and syntax checks up to five cycles.
Keep every project attached to its own memory, files, preview and publish pipeline.
Never commit secrets or frontend API keys into generated files.
Provide a production start command so Render can serve the built frontend and API.
Provide /health and at least one API route for backend verification.

plan: Entender o pedido: Crie um SaaS CRM com login, dashboard e Supabase
Preparar pesquisa externa, Maps, reputação e concorrentes quando houver empresa/local
Modelar o produto como CRM comercial
Criar estrutura do projeto com README, scripts, ferramentas e organização de pastas
Adicionar Supabase como banco padrao com schema SQL e env
Gerar interface principal e dados iniciais
Criar testes de smoke e validar ate 5 ciclos
Preparar preview, editor de arquivos, publish e ZIP

events.label: Pedido recebido
events.detail: Crie um SaaS CRM com login, dashboard e Supabase

events.label: Modelo escolhido

events.label: Ferramentas ativadas

events.label: Preview e ZIP prontos
events.detail: Projeto disponivel para abrir, editar e exportar
